001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Batch;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo.BatchWithEggGroups;
006import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo.BatchWithIncubator;
007import java.util.List;
008import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
009
010public interface BatchRepository {
011
012  LiveData<List<Batch>> getAll();
013
014  LiveData<Batch> get(long id);
015
016  LiveData<List<Batch>> getByIncubator(long incubatorId);
017
018  LiveData<BatchWithEggGroups> getWithGroups(long id);
019
020  LiveData<List<BatchWithEggGroups>> getAllWithGroups();
021
022  LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>> getAllWithIncubator();
023
024  LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>> getAllWithIncubatorOrderByExpectedHatch();
025
026  LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>> getAllWithIncubatorOrderByIncubator();
027
028  LiveData<List<BatchWithIncubator>> getAllWithIncubatorOrderByBatchNumber();
029
030  CompletableFuture<Long> save(Batch batch);
031
032  CompletableFuture<Long> saveWithInitialEggGroups(Batch batch, String breed);
033
034  CompletableFuture<Void> delete(Batch batch);
035}
